/usr/local/cuda-9.0/bin/nvcc  -gencode arch=compute_50,code=[sm_50,compute_50] -w -std=c++11 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/controller.dir/main.cpp.o -o CMakeFiles/controller.dir/cmake_device_link.o  -L/usr/local/cuda-9.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-9.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib ../lib/robot/librobot.a ../lib/parser/libparser.a options/libcontroller_options.a player/libplayer.a -lboost_program_options player/skill/libskill.a player/fsm/libfsm.a player/core/libcore.a player/engine/action/libaction.a player/engine/walk/libwalk.a player/engine/scan/libscan.a player/engine/led/libled.a player/vision/libvision.a -lpthread ../lib/imageproc/libimageproc.a -lopencv_core -lopencv_imgcodecs -lopencv_imgproc ../lib/darknet/libdarknet.a -lcudnn -lcublas -lcurand player/localization/libSL.a -lrt -lstdc++ -lcudart player/sensor/libsensor.a player/server/libserver.a -lMVSDK -lboost_system drivers/dynamixel/libdynamixel.a drivers/gpio/libgpio.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
